seo.title: Tri-County Pest Control | Expert Pest Control in Dallas, TX | Free Quotes
seo.description: Tri-County Pest Control in Dallas, TX offers fast, effective pest management for homes & businesses. Rodents, termites, bed bugs & more. Call (469) 301-9250 today!

hero.headline: Protect Your Home from Unwanted Pests
hero.subheadline: Fast, reliable pest elimination with same-day service and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Solutions for Every Pest Problem
featureSections.body: From rodents and roaches to termites and bed bugs, our certified technicians use advanced techniques to identify, treat, and prevent infestations. We tailor every plan to your property and budget.
bullets: Thorough inspections to find the source
Eco-friendly treatments safe for pets & kids
featureSections.cardBody: Need help now? We offer same-day appointments for urgent infestations — call (469) 301-9250.

featureSections.title: Dallas’ Trusted Pest Control Experts
featureSections.body: We combine years of local knowledge with cutting-edge methods to deliver results you can count on. Our team is licensed, insured, and committed to your peace of mind.
featureSections.cardBody: If pests return between treatments, we’ll come back at no extra charge — no questions asked.

home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Homeowners Choose Tri-County Pest Control

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We understand Dallas’ unique pest challenges — from fire ants to German roaches — and know how to solve them fast.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Friendly Treatments
whyChooseUs.description: Our products are low-toxicity and applied with care, so your family and pets stay safe while pests disappear.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no upsells. You’ll know the cost upfront, and we’ll never charge for extra treatments needed.

whyChooseUs.title: Rapid Response Team
whyChooseUs.description: Call us by noon for most services and a technician will be at your door the same day — guaranteed.

testimonials.quote: They came out the same day I called and solved my ant problem within a week. Fair price and great service!
testimonials.author: Linda R.

testimonials.quote: I was nervous about using chemicals with my toddler, but their eco-friendly approach put me at ease. No more roaches!

testimonials.quote: We had termites in our foundation — Tri-County treated it thoroughly and gave us a solid prevention plan. Highly recommend.

cta.headline: Ready to Reclaim Your Home from Pests?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free inspection today and get a customized treatment plan.

servicesPage.intro: We provide expert pest control services across Dallas and surrounding areas. Whether you’re dealing with a sudden infestation or need ongoing prevention, our team has the tools and experience to protect your property. Explore our services below and call us for a free quote.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Eliminate common household pests like ants, roaches, spiders, and more with our targeted treatments.
services.longDescription: Our general pest control service is designed to tackle the most common invaders in Dallas homes. We start with a thorough inspection to identify entry points and nesting areas, then apply a customized treatment using low-toxicity products. Ongoing monitoring and follow-up visits ensure pests stay gone for good.
benefits: Eliminates ants, roaches, spiders, silverfish & more

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect every room, attic, and crawlspace to find pest activity and entry points.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: Using baiting, spraying, and exclusion methods, we treat affected areas and create a barrier around your home.

process.title: Prevention
process.description: We seal cracks, advise on sanitation, and schedule follow-ups to prevent reinfestation.

faqs.question: How long does a general pest treatment take?
faqs.answer: Most treatments take 30–60 minutes, depending on the size of your home and severity of infestation.

faqs.question: Is the treatment safe for my pets?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use pet-friendly products and will advise you on any temporary precautions, like keeping pets off treated surfaces until dry.

services.title: Termite Control & Prevention
services.shortDescription: Protect your biggest investment from termite damage with our advanced detection and treatment solutions.
services.longDescription: Termites cause billions in damage each year — often before homeowners even notice. Our termite specialists use advanced moisture meters and thermal imaging to detect colonies early. We offer both liquid soil treatments and baiting systems to eliminate colonies and create a long-lasting barrier around your foundation.
benefits: Eliminates entire colonies, not just workers
Long-lasting protection with Sentricon® bait stations
Transferable warranty for peace of mind

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check for mud tubes, damaged wood, and moisture issues using specialized equipment.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: Depending on the infestation, we apply a liquid termiticide around the foundation or install bait stations.

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: We return quarterly to check bait stations and re-treat if termite activity is detected.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have termites?
faqs.answer: Signs include mud tubes on walls, hollow-sounding wood, and discarded wings near windows. We offer free inspections to confirm.

faqs.question: Does termite treatment require me to leave my home?
faqs.answer: No. Our treatments are applied around the exterior and in crawlspaces — you can stay inside during the process.

services.title: Bed Bug Extermination
services.shortDescription: Heat treatments and chemical solutions to rid your home of bed bugs quickly and discreetly.
services.longDescription: Bed bugs are notoriously difficult to eliminate, but our multi-pronged approach ensures complete eradication. We combine heat treatments (raising room temperatures to 135°F) with targeted insecticide applications and steam cleaning. Our team works discreetly and can often complete treatment in a single day.
benefits: Heat treatment kills all life stages
No need to throw away furniture

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect beds, sofas, baseboards, and luggage for signs of bed bugs using K9 or visual detection.

process.title: Preparation
process.description: We guide you on preparing your home — washing linens, clearing clutter, and moving furniture.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply heat and/or chemical treatments, then conduct a thorough post-treatment inspection.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take?
faqs.answer: Most homes require 4–8 hours of heat treatment, plus prep time. Most jobs are completed in one day.

faqs.question: Will the heat damage my electronics?
faqs.answer: We take precautions — you can remove sensitive electronics, or we can treat them separately with non-heat methods.

services.title: Rodent Control & Exclusion
services.shortDescription: Seal out mice and rats with our comprehensive exclusion and trapping services.
services.longDescription: Rodents can spread disease and chew through wiring, creating fire hazards. Our rodent control service starts with a detailed exterior inspection to find every possible entry point. We use a combination of trapping (snap traps, electronic traps) and exclusion (sealing holes with steel wool and caulk) to keep rodents out for good.
benefits: Thorough exclusion — no more rodents entering

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We search for droppings, gnaw marks, and entry points around the foundation, roof, and utility lines.

process.title: Exclusion
process.description: We seal all gaps larger than 1/4 inch using heavy-duty materials and install door sweeps where needed.

process.title: Trapping & Cleanup
process.description: We set traps in active areas, remove dead rodents, and sanitize contaminated insulation if required.

faqs.question: How long does rodent exclusion take?
faqs.answer: Initial sealing usually takes 2–4 hours, but full exclusion may require multiple visits depending on the home’s condition.

faqs.question: Do you clean up rodent droppings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer sanitation services to remove droppings, urine, and contaminated insulation safely.

about.headline: Dallas’ Go-To Pest Control Team Since 2008
about.mission: Our mission is to provide safe, effective pest control that protects homes and families while respecting the environment. We believe in transparency, quality workmanship, and treating every customer like a neighbor.
story: Tri-County Pest Control was founded in 2008 by a team of local pest management professionals who saw a need for honest, thorough service in the Dallas area. Starting with just one truck and a passion for solving pest problems, we grew through word-of-mouth referrals by delivering consistent results. Today, we serve thousands of homes and businesses across Dallas County, Collin County, and Denton County — and we’re still family-owned.

Over the years, we’ve invested in the latest training and equipment, from thermal imaging for termite detection to eco-friendly products that are tough on pests but gentle on your home. Our technicians undergo continuous education to stay ahead of emerging pest threats. We’re proud to be a trusted partner in keeping Dallas properties safe, healthy, and pest-free.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say — from pricing to follow-up visits. You’ll never get a surprise bill or a missed appointment.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: Our technicians are certified, background-checked, and trained to deliver the highest standard of pest control.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to support local schools and charities, and we treat every home as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We invest in the latest pest control technology to provide more effective, less invasive treatments.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Tri-County Pest Control
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your pest-free journey? Call or fill out the form and we’ll get back to you within 24 hours.
